findings.description: Section s3 has an empty title string "". All sections should have a non-empty title. The source material ends with the anchor label `.. _access_to_binary_data:` followed by a section delimiter, indicating the start of a new h2 section whose heading text is not included in the provided source excerpt. The title should reflect the section's subject (e.g., "バイナリデータへのアクセス") or the section should be omitted if no source content is available.
